chunks.text:
Policy
Policy ID: SBC-9040.
Eligibility
Members qualify with a treatment plan updated within 150 days.
Covered Services
•  Outpatient therapy — up to 52 sessions/year.
•  Partial hospitalization — prior authorization required.
•  Family therapy — up to 12 sessions/year.
Verification
Verification phrase: "bronze marmot 07".
